frontmatter.title: Market Maker Game
frontmatter.description: A multiplayer stock-trading game I designed as a board game and then turned into a real-time web app.
frontmatter.keywords: market maker,stock trading game,board game,multiplayer,web game,nextjs,supabase,realtime,trading,ipo
